question:
Which of the following statements best differentiates between natural and manmade disasters ?
(1) Natural disasters are caused only by human negligence, while manmade disasters occur due to natural processes.
(2) Natural disasters originate from environmental or geological phenomena, whereas manmade disasters result from technological failures or human activities.
(3) Both natural and manmade disasters have identical causes but differ only in their economic impact.
(4) Manmade disasters occur suddenly, while natural disasters occur slowly over time.

options.1: Natural disasters are caused only by human negligence, while manmade disasters occur due to natural processes.
options.2: Natural disasters originate from environmental or geological phenomena, whereas manmade disasters result from technological failures or human activities.
options.3: Both natural and manmade disasters have identical causes but differ only in their economic impact.
options.4: Manmade disasters occur suddenly, while natural disasters occur slowly over time.

question: Which of the following statements best reflects the functional role of the Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Management Authority (APSDMA) as per the Disaster Management Act (2005) ?

options.1: APSDMA is a voluntary non-governmental organization primarily engaged in post-disaster relief fund distribution.
options.2: APSDMA functions as the apex state-level statutory body responsible for formulating policies, approving state disaster management plans and coordinating with the NDMA and district authorities for prevention, mitigation and preparedness activities.
options.3: APSDMA operates under the Ministry of Environment and Forests, implementing pollution-control and climate-change programs.
options.4: APSDMA deals only with man-made disasters such as industrial accidents and excludes natural disasters from its jurisdiction.
